mapper.sql: select bkab.*, r.roadway, z.zone_name, bc.borehole_category, d.drilling_name, pb.purpose_borehole, s.shift_info, np.navigation_point_name, s.shift_info AS groutingShift, bkab.monitor, bkab.warden, bkab.eliminate, bkab.eliminate_deputy_general_manager, bkab.eliminate_barmaster, bkab.create_time from t_bk_act_borehole_info bkab LEFT JOIN t_roadway r ON bkab.roadway_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_roadway_zone z ON bkab.roadway_zone_id = z.id LEFT JOIN t_borehole_category bc ON bkab.category_code = bc.category_code LEFT JOIN t_purpose_borehole pb ON bkab.purpose_borehole_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN t_shiftinfo s ON bkab.shift_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_navigation_point np ON bkab.navigation_point_id = np.id left join t_drillinginfo d ON bkab.drillinginfo_id = d.id
mapper.insert:
insert into t_bk_act_borehole_info
roadway_id, roadway_zone_id, group_no, borehole_no, borehole_code, category_code, purpose_borehole_id, drilling_location, drilling_start_x, drilling_start_y, drilling_start_z, is_used_create_coal, drilling_date, shift_id, drillinginfo_id, navigation_point_id, distance_to_navigation_point, direction_to_navigation, aperture, check_aperture, hole_altitude, check_hole_altitude, azimuth_angle, check_azimuth_angle, inclination_angle, check_inclination_angle, angle, check_angle, line_space, check_line_space, hole_space, check_hole_space, borehole_length, check_borehole_length, depth_1st_rock_seam_start, depth_1st_rock_seam_end, depth_1st_coal_seam_start, depth_1st_coal_seam_end, depth_2st_rock_seam_start, depth_2st_rock_seam_end, depth_2st_coal_seam_start, depth_2st_coal_seam_end, depth_3st_rock_seam_start, depth_3st_rock_seam_end, depth_3st_coal_seam_start, depth_3st_coal_seam_end, depth_4st_rock_seam_start, depth_4st_rock_seam_end, bind_coal_1st, bind_coal_2st, bind_coal_3st, is_used_create_coal_1st, is_used_create_coal_2st, is_used_create_coal_3st, extraction_radius, distance_to_centralline_tunnel, pull_drill_date, adjacent_borehole_no, distance_adjacent_borehole, spray_hole_condition, exception_during_drilling, exception_construction, acceptance_status, down_tube_time_start, down_tube_time_end, tube_length, down_tube_chargehand, solid_pipeline_length, sieve_pipeline_length, holeseal_length, holeseal_depth, sealing_hole_diameter, hole_sealing_specification, sealing_material, sieve_tube_length, holeseal_date, holeseal_chargehand, valid_footage, person_construction, chargehand, person_checking_video, person_checking_site, checking_date, sign, time_begin_flushing, time_end_flushing, total_time_flushing, water_pressure_during_flushing, punching_paragraph1, punching_paragraph2, see_rock_coal_case, actual_coal_amount_flushed, completion_ratio_flushed_coal, exception_phenomena, person_construction_flushing, other_person, chargehand_flushing, terminal_hole_date, remark_flushing, file, grouting_date, grouting_shift_id, grouting_start_time, grouting_end_time, grouting_cements, grouting_waters, actual_amount_bag_grouting, actual_bag_pressure, actual_amount_gap_grouting, interlude_grouting_pressure, grouting_person, grouting_exception_label, grouting_person_construction, grouting_chargehand, person_checking_site_grouting, person_checking_video_grouting, monitor, warden, eliminate, eliminate_deputy_general_manager, eliminate_barmaster, remark, create_time
#{roadwayId}, #{roadwayZoneId}, #{groupNo}, #{boreholeNo}, #{boreholeCode}, #{categoryCode}, #{purposeBoreholeId}, #{drillingLocation}, #{drillingStartX}, #{drillingStartY}, #{drillingStartZ}, #{isUsedCreateCoal}, #{drillingDate}, #{shiftId}, #{drillinginfoId}, #{navigationPointId}, #{distanceToNavigationPoint}, #{directionToNavigation}, #{aperture}, #{checkAperture}, #{holeAltitude}, #{checkHoleAltitude}, #{azimuthAngle}, #{checkAzimuthAngle}, #{inclinationAngle}, #{checkInclinationAngle}, #{angle}, #{checkAngle}, #{lineSpace}, #{checkLineSpace}, #{holeSpace}, #{checkHoleSpace}, #{boreholeLength}, #{checkBoreholeLength}, #{depth1stRockSeamStart}, #{depth1stRockSeamEnd}, #{depth1stCoalSeamStart}, #{depth1stCoalSeamEnd}, #{depth2stRockSeamStart}, #{depth2stRockSeamEnd}, #{depth2stCoalSeamStart}, #{depth2stCoalSeamEnd}, #{depth3stRockSeamStart}, #{depth3stRockSeamEnd}, #{depth3stCoalSeamStart}, #{depth3stCoalSeamEnd}, #{depth4stRockSeamStart}, #{depth4stRockSeamEnd}, #{bindCoal1st}, #{bindCoal2st}, #{bindCoal3st}, #{isUsedCreateCoal1st}, #{isUsedCreateCoal2st}, #{isUsedCreateCoal3st}, #{extractionRadius}, #{distanceToCentrallineTunnel}, #{pullDrillDate}, #{adjacentBoreholeNo}, #{distanceAdjacentBorehole}, #{sprayHoleCondition}, #{exceptionDuringDrilling}, #{exceptionConstruction}, #{acceptanceStatus}, #{downTubeTimeStart}, #{downTubeTimeEnd}, #{tubeLength}, #{downTubeChargehand}, #{solidPipelineLength}, #{sievePipelineLength}, #{holesealLength}, #{holesealDepth}, #{sealingHoleDiameter}, #{holeSealingSpecification}, #{sealingMaterial}, #{sieveTubeLength}, #{holesealDate}, #{holesealChargehand}, #{validFootage}, #{personConstruction}, #{chargehand}, #{personCheckingVideo}, #{personCheckingSite}, #{checkingDate}, #{sign}, #{timeBeginFlushing}, #{timeEndFlushing}, #{totalTimeFlushing}, #{waterPressureDuringFlushing}, #{punchingParagraph1}, #{punchingParagraph2}, #{seeRockCoalCase}, #{actualCoalAmountFlushed}, #{completionRatioFlushedCoal}, #{exceptionPhenomena}, #{personConstructionFlushing}, #{otherPerson}, #{chargehandFlushing}, #{terminalHoleDate}, #{remarkFlushing}, #{file}, #{groutingDate}, #{groutingShiftId}, #{groutingStartTime}, #{groutingEndTime}, #{groutingCements}, #{groutingWaters}, #{actualAmountBagGrouting}, #{actualBagPressure}, #{actualAmountGapGrouting}, #{interludeGroutingPressure}, #{groutingPerson}, #{groutingExceptionLabel}, #{groutingPersonConstruction}, #{groutingChargehand}, #{personCheckingSiteGrouting}, #{personCheckingVideoGrouting}, #{monitor}, #{warden}, #{eliminate}, #{eliminateDeputyGeneralManager}, #{eliminateBarmaster}, #{remark},
NOW() datetime('now', 'localtime')
mapper.update:
update t_bk_act_borehole_info
roadway_id = #{roadwayId}, roadway_zone_id = #{roadwayZoneId}, group_no = #{groupNo}, borehole_no = #{boreholeNo}, borehole_code = #{boreholeCode}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, purpose_borehole_id = #{purposeBoreholeId},
drilling_location = #{drillingLocation}, drilling_start_x = #{drillingStartX}, drilling_start_y = #{drillingStartY}, drilling_start_z = #{drillingStartZ}, is_used_create_coal = #{isUsedCreateCoal}, drilling_date = #{drillingDate}, shift_id = #{shiftId}, drillinginfo_id = #{drillinginfoId}, navigation_point_id = #{navigationPointId},
distance_to_navigation_point = #{distanceToNavigationPoint},
direction_to_navigation = #{directionToNavigation}, aperture = #{aperture}, check_aperture = #{checkAperture}, hole_altitude = #{holeAltitude}, check_hole_altitude = #{checkHoleAltitude}, azimuth_angle = #{azimuthAngle}, check_azimuth_angle = #{checkAzimuthAngle}, inclination_angle = #{inclinationAngle}, check_inclination_angle = #{checkInclinationAngle}, angle = #{angle}, check_angle = #{checkAngle}, line_space = #{lineSpace}, check_line_space = #{checkLineSpace}, hole_space = #{holeSpace}, check_hole_space = #{checkHoleSpace}, borehole_length = #{boreholeLength}, check_borehole_length = #{checkBoreholeLength}, depth_1st_rock_seam_start = #{depth1stRockSeamStart}, depth_1st_rock_seam_end = #{depth1stRockSeamEnd}, depth_1st_coal_seam_start = #{depth1stCoalSeamStart}, depth_1st_coal_seam_end = #{depth1stCoalSeamEnd}, depth_2st_rock_seam_start = #{depth2stRockSeamStart}, depth_2st_rock_seam_end = #{depth2stRockSeamEnd}, depth_2st_coal_seam_start = #{depth2stCoalSeamStart}, depth_2st_coal_seam_end = #{depth2stCoalSeamEnd}, depth_3st_rock_seam_start = #{depth3stRockSeamStart}, depth_3st_rock_seam_end = #{depth3stRockSeamEnd}, depth_3st_coal_seam_start = #{depth3stCoalSeamStart}, depth_3st_coal_seam_end = #{depth3stCoalSeamEnd}, depth_4st_rock_seam_start = #{depth4stRockSeamStart}, depth_4st_rock_seam_end = #{depth4stRockSeamEnd}, bind_coal_1st = #{bindCoal1st}, bind_coal_2st = #{bindCoal2st}, bind_coal_3st = #{bindCoal3st}, is_used_create_coal_1st = #{isUsedCreateCoal1st}, is_used_create_coal_2st = #{isUsedCreateCoal2st}, is_used_create_coal_3st = #{isUsedCreateCoal3st}, extraction_radius = #{extractionRadius}, distance_to_centralline_tunnel = #{distanceToCentrallineTunnel},
pull_drill_date = #{pullDrillDate}, adjacent_borehole_no = #{adjacentBoreholeNo}, distance_adjacent_borehole = #{distanceAdjacentBorehole}, spray_hole_condition = #{sprayHoleCondition}, exception_during_drilling = #{exceptionDuringDrilling}, exception_construction = #{exceptionConstruction}, acceptance_status = #{acceptanceStatus}, down_tube_time_start = #{downTubeTimeStart}, down_tube_time_end = #{downTubeTimeEnd}, tube_length = #{tubeLength}, down_tube_chargehand = #{downTubeChargehand}, solid_pipeline_length = #{solidPipelineLength}, sieve_pipeline_length = #{sievePipelineLength}, holeseal_length = #{holesealLength}, holeseal_depth = #{holesealDepth}, sealing_hole_diameter = #{sealingHoleDiameter}, hole_sealing_specification = #{holeSealingSpecification}, sealing_material = #{sealingMaterial}, sieve_tube_length = #{sieveTubeLength}, holeseal_date = #{holesealDate}, holeseal_chargehand = #{holesealChargehand}, valid_footage = #{validFootage}, person_construction = #{personConstruction}, chargehand = #{chargehand}, person_checking_video = #{personCheckingVideo}, person_checking_site = #{personCheckingSite}, checking_date = #{checkingDate}, sign = #{sign}, time_begin_flushing = #{timeBeginFlushing}, time_end_flushing = #{timeEndFlushing}, total_time_flushing = #{totalTimeFlushing}, water_pressure_during_flushing = #{waterPressureDuringFlushing},
punching_paragraph1 = #{punchingParagraph1}, punching_paragraph2 = #{punchingParagraph2}, see_rock_coal_case = #{seeRockCoalCase}, actual_coal_amount_flushed = #{actualCoalAmountFlushed}, completion_ratio_flushed_coal = #{completionRatioFlushedCoal},
exception_phenomena = #{exceptionPhenomena}, person_construction_flushing = #{personConstructionFlushing},
other_person = #{otherPerson}, chargehand_flushing = #{chargehandFlushing}, terminal_hole_date = #{terminalHoleDate}, remark_flushing = #{remarkFlushing}, file = #{file}, grouting_date = #{groutingDate}, grouting_shift_id = #{groutingShiftId}, grouting_start_time = #{groutingStartTime}, grouting_end_time = #{groutingEndTime}, grouting_cements = #{groutingCements}, grouting_waters = #{groutingWaters}, actual_amount_bag_grouting = #{actualAmountBagGrouting}, actual_bag_pressure = #{actualBagPressure}, actual_amount_gap_grouting = #{actualAmountGapGrouting}, interlude_grouting_pressure = #{interludeGroutingPressure},
grouting_person = #{groutingPerson}, grouting_exception_label = #{groutingExceptionLabel}, grouting_person_construction = #{groutingPersonConstruction},
grouting_chargehand = #{groutingChargehand}, person_checking_site_grouting = #{personCheckingSiteGrouting},
person_checking_video_grouting = #{personCheckingVideoGrouting},
monitor = #{monitor}, warden = #{warden}, eliminate = #{eliminate}, eliminate_deputy_general_manager = #{eliminateDeputyGeneralManager},
eliminate_barmaster = #{eliminateBarmaster}, remark = #{remark},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_bk_act_borehole_info where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select concat(a.group_no, "-", a.borehole_no) as boreholdCode, a.* from t_bk_act_borehole_info a

SELECT t_bk_act_borehole_info.id id, t_bk_act_borehole_info.roadway_id roadwayId, t_roadway.roadway roadWayName, t_bk_act_borehole_info.group_no groupId, t_bk_act_borehole_info.borehole_no boreholeNo, t_bk_act_borehole_info.navigation_pointid navPointId, t_navigation_point.navigation_point_name navPointName, t_navigation_point.X x, t_navigation_point.Y y, t_navigation_point.Z z, t_bk_act_borehole_info.exception_during_drilling exceptions FROM t_bk_act_borehole_info, t_navigation_point, t_roadway WHERE t_bk_act_borehole_info.navigation_pointid = t_navigation_point.id AND t_bk_act_borehole_info.roadway_id = t_roadway.id AND exception_during_drilling != "" AND exception_during_drilling != "无"
mapper.delete:
delete from t_bk_act_borehole_info where roadway_zone_id in
#{roadwayZoneIds}
